releases.title: A changelog you can trust
changes: Added a Changelog tab to Settings with a scrollable history of shipped improvements.
Bundled release notes now power both the app and each GitHub Release.
Added CI and release validation so a version cannot ship without matching changelog notes.

releases.title: Open from the notch
changes: Hover over the physical notch or top-center screen area to open Codex Notch with a smooth expansion.
Added intentional-hover detection that avoids repeated or accidental openings.

releases.title: At home in the menu bar
changes: Moved the notch header into the menu-bar band.
Header controls now flank the measured hardware notch instead of sitting below it.

releases.title: Shortcuts stay put
changes: Holding Control and Shift now freezes task ordering so an incoming update cannot change the shortcut under your fingers.
Added a visible LOCKED state while shortcut ordering is frozen.

releases.title: Know your weekly pace
changes: Added weekly Codex usage remaining directly to the notch.
Added local usage history and a trend-based forecast for when the weekly limit may run out.
Connections is now the default Settings tab.

releases.title: Task settings, restored
changes: Rebuilt the Tasks tab layout so controls, descriptions, and shortcuts remain readable without overlap.

releases.title: Themes with a point of view
changes: Added authored themes with distinct type and surface treatments, including an all-black theme.

releases.title: Active tasks at your fingertips
changes: Active tasks now participate in the same keyboard shortcut flow as completed tasks.

releases.title: Sounds that ship
changes: Fixed packaged completion sounds and sound preview crashes.
Theme previews now use the real Codex Notch instead of an embedded imitation.

releases.title: Settings that hold their shape
changes: Kept the Settings window at a stable size while switching between tabs.

releases.title: Choices you can actually see
changes: Fixed collapsed theme and sound grids and added layout regression coverage.

releases.title: The customizable Codex Notch
changes: Added active tasks, themes, completion sounds, remote-host health, and shortcut hints.
Added Codex Notch Do Not Disturb for suppressing automatic openings without using macOS Focus.
